issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
Instructions only provide Node.js examples despite claiming multi-language compatibility.

scenarios.name: Order shipped email with template
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reached for sendEmail with hardcoded HtmlBody and skipped MessageStream; treatment used sendEmailWithTemplate with TemplateAlias, TemplateModel variables, and MessageStream: 'outbound' as documented.

scenarios.name: Bulk invoice send
scenarios.rationale: Baseline looped sendEmail 300 times without batching or Tag usage; treatment used sendEmailBatch in a single call with a Tag for analytics tracking.
